name: multi-field-overlay-interval-width-heatmap
description: Multi-Field scene with intervalWidthHeatmap overlay enabled. Cells colored by SDF complexity (intervalWidth / cellDiagonal — cool = simple primitive, hot = CSG / smooth-union). Read directly from NarrowBandClassifier output via cascadeManager.getMultiscaleSignalState() (Stage 1 of ADR 0014).
